Minnesota @ Memphis Picks & Props

Picks Consensus Projections Trends Top User Picks

MIN vs MEM Picks

NBA Picks
Total Assists
Ty Jerome o3.5 Total Assists (+120)
Best Odds
o2.5 -180
These are quick bet odds
Pick made: 6 hours ago
Jon Metler
Betting Analyst
o3.5  +109
These are quick bet odds
o2.5  -180
These are quick bet odds
o2.5  -184
These are quick bet odds
o2.5  -295
These are quick bet odds
o3.5  +105
These are quick bet odds

Ty Jerome is just returning from an injury that kept him sidelined for the start of the season, so he’s likely to be on a minutes restriction after logging only 19 minutes in his season debut. Even with limited run, this number is simply too low. I have the over 3.5 assists priced closer to -120, yet it’s currently available at +120. Jerome already showed strong pick-and-roll chemistry with Jock Landale on Saturday against the Timberwolves, finishing with six assists in that game. He isn’t a speed-based guard; he’s a methodical pace manipulator who can comfortably attack drop coverage, force Rudy Gobert to commit, and then deliver pocket passes to his bigs.

Record a Double-Double
Rudy Gobert Record a Double-Double (Yes: -110)
Best Odds
 +120
These are quick bet odds
Pick made: 9 hours ago
Jason Logan
Senior Betting Analyst
 +116
These are quick bet odds
 -110
These are quick bet odds
 +120
These are quick bet odds
 +100
These are quick bet odds
 +112
These are quick bet odds

A depleted Grizzlies interior has led to a spike in points in the paint from those opponents, with Memphis going from an average of just 48.6 PITP allowed to 53.3 points against in the key over the last six contests. Gobert recorded nine of his 22 double-doubles over his 14 games in January and just missed No. 23 by one point on Saturday (9 points, 16 rebounds). Player projections for Monday’s return meeting in Memphis have Gobert’s offensive output north of 11 points with a ceiling of 12.3 while his rebound forecast calls for double figures and a high of 12 boards.

The 2nd-speediest pace-of-play home team in the league over the last 25 games has been the Grizzlies.. The Timberwolves have played at the 2nd-fastest pace in the league over the last 15 games, which ought to increase possessions for the Memphis Grizzlies.. Offensive rebounds maintain possession and create further opportunities for scoring and assists, and the Grizzlies grade out 6th-best in in the league with 13.4 offensive boards per game over the last 10 games.

How is Value calculated?

Our value picks are based on the Expected Value (EV) of placing the bet, using our projections and the current odds price:

0-2 Stars: Negative to Even EV
3-4 Stars: Positive EV
5 Stars: Highest EV
